Title: Marker-free carotenoid-enriched rice generated through targeted gene insertion using CRISPR-Cas9

Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Core carotenoid pathway; phytoene formation step
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Condenses two molecules of geranylgeranyl diphosphate to form phytoene
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Supplies the first committed carotenoid intermediate leading to β-carotene accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Key control step; widely used carotenoid engineering enzyme and part of the GR2 cassette used here
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Targeted insertion of the cassette containing ZmPsy enabled high β-carotene accumulation and golden endosperm in rice seeds
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Targeted insertion by CRISPR-Cas9; PCR genotyping; Sanger sequencing; Southern blot; whole-genome sequencing; genetic co-segregation; HPLC metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Expressed in rice endosperm from an endosperm-specific glutelin promoter in the inserted cassette
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Greenhouse growth; seed endosperm analysis after harvest
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: No detectable penalty in morphology or yield reported for the carotenoid-enriched line
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful cassette component for generating provitamin A rice via targeted insertion at genomic safe harbors; supports marker-free trait stacking
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. ZmPsy was one of two biosynthetic genes inserted as part of a 5.2 kb marker-free carotenoid cassette into predefined safe-harbor loci in rice. 2. In the homozygous targeted line 48A-7, the cassette drove golden endosperm and β-carotene accumulation of 7.90 ± 0.19 μg g^-1 dry weight in polished seeds. 3. The phenotype co-segregated with the targeted insertion and occurred without detectable morphology or yield penalty.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The study functionally evaluates the inserted cassette as a unit; the individual contribution of ZmPsy versus SSU-crtI was not separated experimentally in this paper.

Pathway_Genes.Enzyme_Name: Phytoene desaturase (bacterial crtI fusion with plastid transit peptide)
Pathway_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Bacterial carotenoid desaturase fused to pea RUBISCO small subunit transit peptide
Pathway_Genes.Source_Species: Erwinia uredovora fusion with pea transit peptide
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Core carotenoid pathway; phytoene desaturation module
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Desaturates phytoene through bacterial-type multi-step desaturation to produce lycopene
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Forms the carotenoid intermediate precursor pool leading to β-carotene accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Targeted insertion of the cassette containing SSU-crtI enabled high β-carotene accumulation and golden endosperm in rice seeds
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Targeted insertion by CRISPR-Cas9; PCR genotyping; Sanger sequencing; Southern blot; whole-genome sequencing; genetic co-segregation; HPLC metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Expressed in rice endosperm from an endosperm-specific glutelin promoter in the inserted cassette
Pathway_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Greenhouse growth; seed endosperm analysis after harvest
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: No detectable penalty in morphology or yield reported for the carotenoid-enriched line
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful cassette component for generating provitamin A rice via targeted insertion at genomic safe harbors; supports marker-free trait stacking
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. SSU-crtI was one of two biosynthetic genes inserted as part of a 5.2 kb marker-free carotenoid cassette into predefined safe-harbor loci in rice. 2. In the homozygous targeted line 48A-7, the cassette drove golden endosperm and β-carotene accumulation of 7.90 ± 0.19 μg g^-1 dry weight in polished seeds. 3. The phenotype co-segregated with the targeted insertion and occurred without detectable morphology or yield penalty.
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: SSU-crtI is a functional fusion consisting of the pea RUBISCO small subunit chloroplast transit peptide and the Erwinia uredovora crtI enzyme. The study assesses the cassette jointly rather than dissecting this gene independently.
